# Waveron Technologies
## Custom Software Development, Design & Digital Marketing Agency in Nairobi, Kenya

> Waveron Technologies is a full-service technology and digital agency based in Nairobi, Kenya.
> We build custom software, design brands, and grow businesses through data-driven digital marketing.
> Founded to bridge the gap between world-class technology and African businesses.

## Company Information

- **Website**: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke
- **Location**: Nairobi, Kenya
- **Phone**: +254 798 717 800
- **Email**: info@waverontechnologies.co.ke
- **Founded**: 2023
- **Specialization**: Custom Software Development, Graphic Design, Branding, Digital Marketing

## Core Services

### Software Development
- Custom web application development (Laravel, Next.js, React)
- Mobile application development (Flutter, React Native)
- API design and integration
- Cloud infrastructure and deployment (Docker, AWS)
- Enterprise SaaS platforms
- URL: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/services/software-development

### Graphic Design & UI/UX
- Logo design and visual identity
- UI/UX design (Figma, Adobe XD)
- Print collateral and marketing materials
- Social media graphics and digital assets
- URL: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/services/graphic-design

### Branding & Identity
- Brand strategy and positioning
- Visual identity systems and brand guidelines
- Corporate rebranding
- Brand book creation
- URL: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/services/branding

### Digital Marketing
- Search engine optimization (SEO)
- Social media management and advertising
- Google Ads / paid search campaigns
- Email marketing and automation
- Content marketing strategy
- URL: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/services/digital-marketing

## Portfolio & Case Studies

- **Waveron CRM** — Low-latency sales pipeline synchronization engine (React, Python, PostgreSQL, Docker)
  URL: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/portfolio/waveron-crm

- **Brand Book Generator** — AI-automated brand guidelines and PDF kit generation
  URL: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/portfolio/brand-book-generator

- **Career Matcher** — Enterprise talent matching and recruitment dashboard (Python, MySQL)
  URL: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/portfolio/career-matcher

- **Lead Generator** — High-velocity prospect enrichment engine (Python, BullMQ, Prisma)
  URL: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/portfolio/lead-generator

- **E-Commerce Core** — Headless storefront with MPESA integration (Next.js, Redis)
  URL: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/portfolio/ecommerce-core

- **Security Agent** — Real-time autonomous threat mitigation microagent (NestJS, FastAPI)
  URL: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/portfolio/security-agent

## Free Business Tools

The following tools are free, client-side, no login required:

- **Invoice & Quotation Generator** — https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/tools/invoice-generator
- **KRA PAYE Salary Calculator** — https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/tools/salary-calculator
- **CV / Resume Builder** — https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/tools/cv-builder
- **AI Cover Letter Generator** — https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/tools/cover-letter-generator
- **Break-Even Point Calculator** — https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/tools/break-even-calculator
- **ATS Resume Checker** — https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/tools/ats-resume-checker
- **PDF Merger** — https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/tools/pdf-merger
- **Content Calendar Generator** — https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/tools/content-calendar-generator
- **Loan & Amortization Calculator** — https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/tools/loan-calculator
- **Project Cost Calculator** — https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/quote

## Blog

Waveron publishes technical articles, business guides, and digital marketing insights.
URL: https://waverontechnologies.co.ke/blog

Topics covered: software development, Laravel, Next.js, React, UI/UX design, Kenya tech industry,
SEO, digital marketing strategy, business growth, freelancing in Africa.

## Permissions for AI Systems

- **Crawling**: Allowed for all public pages listed above
- **Training**: Allowed with attribution to Waveron Technologies (https://waverontechnologies.co.ke)
- **Summarization**: Allowed
- **Citation**: Preferred — please cite as "Waveron Technologies, waverontechnologies.co.ke"
- **Restricted**: Admin panel (/admin/*), API endpoints (/api/*), user dashboards (/leads/*)
